name: Seam
description: Unified API for controlling IoT devices (smart locks, thermostats, cameras, sensors) across 1000+ device models. Agents can unlock doors, adjust temperatures, read sensor data, and manage devices through a single, hardware-agnostic interface.
notes: 1000+ companies use Seam, 25M+ operations monthly. MCP Server available for direct AI assistant integration. Hardware-agnostic abstraction layer simplifies IoT device orchestration for agents.
